name: AMETEK INC/
sic_description: Industrial Instruments For Measurement, Display, and Control
summary: PART I General Development of Business AMETEK, Inc. (AMETEK or the Company) is incorporated in Delaware. Its predecessor was originally incorporated in Delaware in 1930 under the name American Machine and Metals, Inc. AMETEK is a leading global manufacturer of electronic instruments and electromechanical devices with operations in North America, Europe, Asia and South America. AMETEK maintains its principal executive offices at 1100Cassatt Road, Berwyn, Pennsylvania, 19312. Listed on the New Yor...
